Record Class MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.springframework.ai.mistralai.api.MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage
Record Components:
content - The content of the message. Can be either a list of MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ContentChunk or a String.
role - The role of the messages author. Could be one of the MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.Role types.
name - The name of the author of the message.
toolCalls - The tool calls generated by the model, such as function calls. Applicable only for MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.Role.ASSISTANT role and null otherwise.
toolCallId - Tool call that this message is responding to. Only applicable for the MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.Role.TOOL role and null otherwise.
Enclosing class:
MistralAiApi
public static record MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage(@Nullable Object content, @Nullable MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.Role role, @Nullable String name, @Nullable List<MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ToolCall> toolCalls, @Nullable String toolCallId) extends Record
Message comprising the conversation.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Ricken Bazolo, Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale, Jason Smith, Nicolas Krier, Sebastien Deleuze

  • Constructor Details

    • ChatCompletionMessage

      public ChatCompletionMessage(@Nullable Object content, MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.Role role, @Nullable String name, List<MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ToolCall> toolCalls)
      Message comprising the conversation.
      Parameters:
      content - The content of the message.
      role - The role of the messages author. Could be one of the MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.Role types.
      name - The name of the author of the message.
      toolCalls - The tool calls generated by the model, such as function calls. Applicable only for MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.Role.ASSISTANT role and null otherwise.

    • ChatCompletionMessage

      public ChatCompletionMessage(@Nullable Object content, MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.Role role)
      Create a chat completion message with the given content and role. All other fields are null.
      Parameters:
      content - The content of the message.
      role - The role of the author of this message.

    • ChatCompletionMessage

      public ChatCompletionMessage(@Nullable Object content, @Nullable MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.Role role, @Nullable String name, @Nullable List<MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ToolCall> toolCalls, @Nullable String toolCallId)
      Creates an instance of a ChatCompletionMessage record class.
      Parameters:
      content - the value for the content record component
      role - the value for the role record component
      name - the value for the name record component
      toolCalls - the value for the toolCalls record component
      toolCallId - the value for the toolCallId record component

  • Method Details

    • extractThinkingReferenceContent

      public @Nullable List<Integer> extractThinkingReferenceContent()
      Extract thinking reference content as integers.

      Note: This method handles only content as a list of MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ThinkChunk containing MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ReferenceChunk.

    • extractThinkingTextContent

      public @Nullable String extractThinkingTextContent()
      Extract thinking text content as string.

      Note: This method handles only content as a list of MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ThinkChunk containing MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.TextChunk.

    • extractTextContent

      public @Nullable String extractTextContent()
      Extract text content as string.

      Note: This method handles only content as a list of MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.TextChunk or a String.

    • extractReferenceContent

      public @Nullable List<Integer> extractReferenceContent()
      Extract text content as integers.

      Note: This method handles only content as a list of MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ReferenceChunk.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
